report.summary: Standup v3 Apr 4: 5 agent runs since v2 (eod×2, publish×2, community×1). Published slugs up to 696 (+18 uncommitted). Queue exhausted to 2 pages (both need page.tsx). Community drafted tweets #510-514 + newsletter v55 covering record F&G streak, quantum-resistant crypto, April token unlocks. 128 uncommitted files. Production frozen at e3f63fc (2 days). F&G recovering to ~28 from extreme low of 8. Deploy remains sole critical blocker.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v2 → v3: 5 agent runs — eod×2, publish×2, community×1. No build cycle ran. This is standup run #3 today.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 696 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 678 at v2 — 18 new entries added in uncommitted changes by publish agent). All uncommitted — production still serves old registry.

QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted to 2 entries. Both /learn/monad-guide and /learn/zora-attention-markets-guide-2026 still missing page.tsx. ~539 unpublished pages with page.tsx available for queue refill.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT (since v2): 5 tweets drafted (#510-514) — record F&G streak (8/100, 60+ days), Naoris quantum-resistant launch, ALGO +23% on Google QAI, April token unlocks $600M+, weekend snapshot. Newsletter v55 'Extreme Fear Hits Record Territory'. 3 new social card SVGs (fear-greed-record, quantum-resistant, token-unlocks).
PUBLISH OUTPUT (since v2): publish-v2 found queue exhausted — 0 pages promoted. 20 pages published across earlier runs today. Queue needs refill from ~539 inventory.

EOD OUTPUT (since v2): eod-v2 confirmed 1,251 page.tsx files, 696 published slugs, 111 phantom slugs, 125 uncommitted files (now 128). 4 tool pages built but not in PUBLISHED_PAGES (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap). All 6 API routes structurally healthy.

MARKET: BTC ~$66,650 (stable week-over-week). F&G recovering to ~28 from extreme low of 8 on Apr 2. Stablecoins $316B ATH. Iran war headlines receding slightly. Naoris quantum-resistant protocol launched. ALGO +23% on Google Quantum AI citation. April token unlocks $600M+ (ARB $180M, APT $120M, OP $95M, SUI $85M).
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel, alternative.me. Market data sourced from web search. No live traffic delta available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v2: 5 agent runs — eod×2 (QA + data engineer + devops audit), publish×2 (queue exhausted, 0 new promotions), community×1 (tweets #510-514, newsletter v55, 3 SVGs).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 8 agent runs before this standup. standup×2 ($90), eod×2 ($126), publish×2 ($110), community×1 ($41). This standup = 9th run. Total human-equiv today: $412.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY: Deploy debt now 2 full days. 128 uncommitted files. Production frozen at e3f63fc. 696 published slugs in registry vs stale production. 18 new page entries, 6+ learn guide updates, 5 OG images, 4 tool pages, StablecoinYieldTracker refactor — all trapped. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL NEEDED: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted. Only 2 entries remain (monad-guide, zora — both need page.tsx). ~539 unpublished pages with page.tsx ready for queue refill. Next build cycle should scaffold monad + zora, then refill queue with batch from inventory.
P2 — 4 TOOL PAGES NOT PROMOTED: token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap built with page.tsx but not in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Should be promoted in next publish cycle.
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom slugs (missing page.tsx), 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking), 0/6 API rate limiting at route level, defi-yields route most fragile (no fallback data).
P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide and solana-vs-ethereum warn status. defi-yields API hardening deferred.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — CRITICAL): 2 days of agent output trapped in 128 uncommitted files. 696 published slugs, 18 new entries, 4 tool pages, community content — all invisible without deploy. Every hour of delay = content freshness decay. F&G recovering (8→28) means risk appetite returning — deploy now to capture organic search as sentiment improves. JEFE: authorize commit + Vercel deploy.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH_QUEUE + SCAFFOLD MISSING PAGES: Queue is empty. Scaffold page.tsx for monad-guide and zora-attention-markets. Then refill PUBLISH_QUEUE with 20-50 pages from the ~539 unpublished inventory. Promote 4 built tool pages (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap). This unblocks the publish agent for the next cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON SENTIMENT RECOVERY: F&G recovering from 8 to 28 — 'extreme fear to fear' transition historically precedes rallies. Content about quantum-resistant crypto (Naoris launch, ALGO +23%) and April token unlocks ($600M+) is time-sensitive. Deploy would let these capture organic search while topics are hot. Community has tweets + newsletter ready to amplify.

report.email: Resend API blocked by browser CORS (Failed to fetch from google.com context). Consistent with all prior cycles. Report saved to reports/ folder.
